prompt: A sweeping Atlantic coastline at golden hour viewed from a high cliff, layered sea haze, soft film grain, contemplative mood, ultra-premium editorial travel photography
composition: ultra-wide frame, horizon in upper third, strong foreground cliff texture, generous calm negative space
lighting: warm low-angle sunlight with subtle atmospheric glow
palette: amber sunlight, deep teal sea, muted sand neutrals
constraints: no people, no buildings, no text, no logos, no watermark
negative: stock-photo look, oversharpening, neon saturation, artificial HDR

prompt: Quiet ocean inlet with gentle waves and reflective water, minimal composition, meditative and elegant visual language for luxury philosophy brand booklet
composition: horizontal frame with clean geometry and open breathing space
lighting: soft sunrise light with natural haze
palette: warm cream, seafoam teal, soft gold highlights
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no dramatic storms

prompt: Open coastal road curving toward distant horizon with one classic motorcycle rider in silhouette, atmosphere of freedom, curiosity, and calm movement
composition: wide shot with road as leading line, subject small in frame
lighting: golden-hour side light, soft bloom, realistic film grain
palette: sunset amber, muted blue sky, earthy asphalt tones
constraints: no text overlays, no logos, no watermark
negative: action-sports aggression, motion blur chaos, neon colors

prompt: Interior scene framed through a large window looking out to mountain lake at dusk, foreground bokeh, slow contemplative mood, premium visual storytelling aesthetic
composition: frame-within-frame composition, balanced symmetry, layered depth
lighting: warm interior practicals mixed with cool twilight outside
palette: warm tungsten amber, slate blue, forest green
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark
negative: futuristic sci-fi, cluttered props, glossy CGI look

prompt: Refined artisan studio table with sketchbooks, camera, analog journal, and ceramic cup arranged in an intentional ecosystem layout, top-down composition
composition: flat-lay with modular object clusters and clear spacing
palette: warm parchment, charcoal, muted olive, brass accents
constraints: no visible brand names, no text, no logos, no watermark
negative: messy desk, plastic look, oversaturated color grading

prompt: Expansive sky above distant ocean horizon after sunrise, luminous clouds and a subtle sense of awe, minimal high-end editorial mood
composition: wide panoramic feel, horizon low in frame, cloud drama with restraint
lighting: early morning golden light diffused through clouds
palette: ivory light, pale cyan, warm apricot highlights
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no birds close-up
